name: forge-ai/mcp-zendesk
description: FORA Zendesk MCP server — exposes list_tickets, get_ticket, search_tickets, create_ticket, update_ticket, add_comment, list_macros, apply_macro over MCP/stdio. Auth via Zendesk API token (Basic auth, base64(email/token:apitoken)). Pinned to a single Zendesk subdomain on startup.
